sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong upna, hong gupna, thupha bel hong tung hi;
Hong gumta, hong tum ta, Topa Jesuh Kumpi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mittawte aw Jesuh en un, Adahte lungdam un;
Jesuh in hong suahtakzo hi, Thong sung omte’n

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong it manin Jesuh si a, Phat huai lamdang bel hi;
